title: FurnitureIntentSpec
description: Intencao de UM movel dentro de um SceneIntentSpec. O SceneComposer resolve type+style_family num generator procedural (tools/sofa_builder.py, tools/decor_builders.py) e material_style numa cor/material do StylePack. NAO referencia asset externo — tudo parametrico. Schema documental (validacao executavel em scene_composer.validate_furniture_intent).

type.description: tipos suportados na slice 1 do Intent-to-Scene (living room vertical)

role.description: papel na composicao: hero = peca principal (1 por cena); anchor = ancora a zona (rug); companion = serve o hero (coffee/side table); textile/light/decor = camadas

style_family.description: familia do generator procedural, ex: dark_lounge (sofa), low_slab (coffee_table), slim_metal (floor_lamp/side_table), abstract_panel (wall_art), soft_panel (curtain), leafy_volume (plant)

dimensions_m.description: dimensoes explicitas em metros (vence size_hint quando presente)

size_hint.description: tamanho relativo quando dimensions_m nao e' dado; o generator escolhe dims plausiveis

material_style.description: role de material no StylePack (chave de style_pack.materials), ex: hero_fabric, rug, table_top, metal_accent, curtain

placement_hint.description: dica de posicao resolvida pelo composer: main_wall | centered_under_hero | front_of_hero | beside_hero | near_window | on_window | above_hero | corner

priority.description: ordem de colocacao (1 = primeiro). Em conflito de espaco, prioridade menor vence

notes.description: intencao livre do diretor de arte (nao executavel)
